name: One piece rpg
description:
This takes place in one piece, it’s an a rpg! You can do whatever you want, the skies the limit.

In the world of one piece there devil fruits and pirates, even marines wishing to take those pirates down!

What will YOU do, will you become a pirate and explore your destiny, will you be a marine and take down pirates, will you travel the world or stay where you are do what you want.

Meet the straw hats meet another people, or you can make your own characters this is YOUR story YOUR destiny in the world of one piece.
creator: Sarachidouin
